description:
Must: Malaysian
Exp: 1+ yr (Fresh Graduates can be considered)
Key Responsibilities
•             Design, develop, and maintain Python-based automation test scripts
•             Execute functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing
•             Analyze test results, identify defects, and work closely with developers for resolution
•             Perform test case design, test execution, and defect reporting
•             Support validation of software features, APIs, and system workflows
•             Participate in test planning, documentation, and continuous improvement activities
•             Debug issues through log analysis and structured troubleshooting
•             Collaborate with global teams to meet project timelines and quality standards
Required Qualifications
•             Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related field
•             1–4 years of experience in software testing or test automation (Fresh graduates can be considered)
•             Strong Python programming skills for automation testing
•             Understanding of software testing life cycle (STLC) and QA methodologies
•             Experience with test case design, execution, and defect tracking
•             Familiarity with Git or version control systems
•             Ability to work independently and in a fast-paced team environment
